name: optimus
description: Skills marketplace for Droid (Factory) and Claude Code

plugins.name: cycle-migrate
plugins.description: Stage 0: Discovers existing task files in any format and converts them to the standard optimus tasks.md format. Runs once per project.

plugins.name: cycle-report
plugins.description: Stage 0: Task status dashboard. Shows progress, active/blocked/ready tasks, dependency graph, and parallelization opportunities. Read-only.

plugins.name: cycle-crud
plugins.description: Administrative: Create, edit, remove, and reorder tasks in tasks.md. Runs on any branch.

plugins.name: cycle-spec-stage-1
plugins.description: Stage 1: Validates task specifications against project docs before implementation. Catches gaps, contradictions, and test coverage holes.

plugins.name: cycle-impl-stage-2
plugins.description: Stage 2: End-to-end task implementation with verification gates, code review, and commit approval.

plugins.name: cycle-impl-review-stage-3
plugins.description: Stage 3: Validates completed task implementation against spec, coding standards, and best practices using parallel specialist agents.

plugins.name: cycle-pr-review-stage-4
plugins.description: Stage 4 (optional): Unified PR review orchestrator. Collects findings from Codacy, DeepSource, CodeRabbit, human reviewers, resolves threads. Runs between cycle-impl-review-stage-3 and cycle-close-stage-5.

plugins.name: cycle-close-stage-5
plugins.description: Stage 5: Verifies all prerequisites (commits pushed, PR ready, tests passing) and marks the task as done. Offers to merge the PR during cleanup.

plugins.name: deep-doc-review
plugins.description: Deep review of project documentation. Finds errors, inconsistencies, gaps, and improvements with interactive resolution.

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Parallel code review with consolidation, deduplication, and interactive finding-by-finding resolution.

plugins.name: coderabbit-review
plugins.description: CodeRabbit-driven code review with TDD fix cycle and secondary agent validation.

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Two-phase code verification (Go, TypeScript, Python, generic): parallel static analysis + sequential tests with MERGE_READY/NEEDS_FIX verdict.
